titleStmt.title: SII 8.645: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 645. (A.R. No. 336 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH BASE OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉmarkku y[ Āṇṭu 10]- Āvatu maṟavaīśva ragṛ hattup perumāṉaṭikaḷ tevatāṉattup paṇicey makkaḷukkum ceṉṉaṭaikkum nivanta(m) maṭaitta ṉilanikki niṉṟa
nilam Ārattiuṭaiyāṉ koyil melaitteṟṟi naṟuvili vayakkittu kāley kāṇi Ārattiuṭaiyāṉ koyiliṉ kiḻaittoṇṭi Eḻumāvarai tiruppaḷḷittāman toṭuppār nila
ttiṉmikai koyilnilam niṉṟa nilam Araikkāl vaṭavāynattattil koyil nilam mākāṇi maṟavaṉvāyiṉ kiḻaip peruñcāttaṉvayakkal mukkāṇi teṉvāy nattattuk koyilnilam mākāṇi meḻukkaṭikaḷ
mār nilattiṉ teṉvāy kkuḷaṅkaraiyiṉ kiḻainilam mākāṇi Amarāpati maṅkalattup potuvāṉa nilam Oṉṟe yiraṇṭumā kuṟaḷpuḷikkāṉa tuṭavai Oru māvarai paṇappan
tuṟaiyiṉ melainilam Araikkāl kaḻumalattu vākaicceyyiṉ teṉvāynilam Iraṇṭumā maṟavaṉvāyil mukkāṇi vaḻiyum mukkāṇi koyilp paṇicey makkaḷ nilattil Araikkāl .The inscription probably ends here.
Digital edition of SII 8.645 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
